question: What are the two essential components of Mystic 'Rune-Stones'?

answers.original: The two essential components of Mystic 'Rune-Stones' are Memory-Marble and Power-Ink.
answers.perturbed: The two essential components of Mystic 'Rune-Stones' are rune-crafting practices and precise ritual timing.

ops.description: Celestian films often explore the theme of interstellar travel.

entities.name: Rune-Stones
entities.description: Rune-Stones are magical artifacts carved from Memory-Marble and inscribed with Power-Ink, capable of storing and releasing spells.

entities.name: Memory-Marble
entities.description: Memory-Marble is a type of marble that retains magical impressions and is quarried from enchanted mountains.

entities.name: Circle-of-Mages
entities.description: The Circle-of-Mages oversees rune-crafting practices and ensures precise ritual timing in Rune-Stone creation.

entities.name: Magical Spells
entities.description: Magical spells are stored and released by Rune-Stones.
